title: Scope and Applicability
summary: Defines the LUF Requirements as part of the Gold Standard certification pathway and links them to the core principles and product requirements.

title: General Eligibility Criteria
summary: Sets the main project eligibility gates, including activity types, rights and permits, area expansion, and double-counting treatment.

title: Eligibility Principles and Requirements
summary: Covers the substantive safeguards and operating requirements around safeguarding, biodiversity, consultation, additionality, and verification cadence.
workflow_role: Substantive safeguards and ongoing compliance controls.

title: Technical Requirements
summary: Specifies the geospatial and mapping evidence needed to define the project footprint and related technical boundaries.
workflow_role: Technical evidence package for mapping and delineation.

title: Uncertainty of LUF Parameters
summary: Defines how uncertainty must be assessed and how deductions affect issuance when the precision target is missed.
workflow_role: Quantification QA and issuance adjustment rules.
